source_doc.description: Primary-source citation identifier (法令番号 / 公報号 / first-party URL). Aggregator URLs banned at ingest layer.
source_doc.title: Source Doc

extracted_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the ETL extraction. Used for staleness detection in dim Q time-machine queries.
extracted_at.title: Extracted At

verified_by.description: How the fact has been verified. manual = human operator, cron_etl_v3 = current-gen ETL job, ed25519_sig = signed by operator key.
verified_by.title: Verified By

confidence.description: Confidence score in [0.0, 1.0]. Typically driven by cross-source agreement (dim I).
confidence.title: Confidence
